title: tectaria subaequalis
intro: Tectaria subaequalis is a species of fern, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tectaria subaequalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Tectaria subaequalis often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
